db:insert.doc:name: Add consultation
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO consultations (patient_reference, practitioner_name, visit_date, reason_for_visit, clinical_notes, prescriptions_list, blood_pressure, temperature) VALUES (:patientId, :practioner, :date, :reason, :notes, :prescription, :bloodPressure, :temperature)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ patientId: vars.patientId, practioner: vars.consultation.practitionerName, date: vars.consultation.visitDate as DateTime as LocalDateTime, reason: vars.consultation.reasonForVisit, notes: vars.consultation.clinicalNotes, prescription: vars.consultation.prescriptionsList default null, bloodPressure: vars.consultation.bloodPressure default null, temperature: vars.consultation.temperature default null }]

logger.doc:name: After retrieve consultations
Debug retrieve consultations

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 import * from modules::CamelizeKeys output application/json --- camelizeData(vars.consultations)

logger.doc:name: Debug camelize keys
After retrieve allergies
Debug retrieve allergies

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 import * from modules::CamelizeKeys output application/json --- camelizeData(vars.allergies)

logger.doc:name: Debug camelize keys
After retrieve medications
Debug retrieve medications
Debug patient allergy conflict"
